reason: Four modules exist in source but are undocumented: tunnel.js, src/cli/, runtime/vad.js, HTTPS/middleware. DBB requires architecture coverage.
proposedChange: Add sections for: tunnel.js (LAN tunnel via ngrok/cloudflared), src/cli/setup.js + browser.js, runtime/vad.js (RMS energy VAD), HTTPS/middleware layer (cert.js, httpsServer.js, middleware.js).
